title: The Problem Solvers | Michael Truell at Cursor
summary: Cursor is an AI-native coding platform that helps engineers and builders ship code through agents. Founded by Michael Truell, it has grown from 15 to 700 people and serves over 60% of Fortune 500 companies, built in close partnership with Anthropic.
writeup: This video profiles Cursor, an AI-native coding platform that uses agents to help engineers and builders ship code, through the lens of founder Michael Truell. It traces the company's growth from 15 to 700 people and its reach across more than 60% of Fortune 500 companies. The key context is Cursor's close partnership with Anthropic, which underpins the platform's agent-driven code generation.
